title: MSS
description: A small mod that i will update overtime, containing custom weapons, cooking using brewing stands, and building blocks
body:
This mod was made for me and my Friends to play with on our Private server for fun
              Most of this is W.I.P
         Mod will recieve frequent updates
         
It adds new foods that use the brewing stand
And new foods that dont such as Fried Eggs, and Smoked Hoglin/Hoglinhams

 2 New weapons,
 "The Needle" Which is a movement weapon that lets you dash with right click
 "Sharby" an Axe that lets you strike lightning

 More will be added as i update the mod
